_source: Artificial Analysis Intelligence Index — https://artificialanalysis.ai (API: /api/v2/data/llms/models). Attribution to artificialanalysis.ai is required.
_note: Maps OpenRouter model slugs -> Artificial Analysis model slugs. The ranker (scripts/rank-ai-models.mjs) fetches the live Intelligence Index per AA slug via the AA API (needs ARTIFICIAL_ANALYSIS_API_KEY in .env). AA lists multiple variants per model (reasoning / non-reasoning / effort); the `aa` slug below pins which variant counts as 'intelligence' — we use the flagship reasoning variant. `fallback` is a static value used only when a model is not on AA or the API is unavailable.
